positive: Symmetrical, intricate overhead composition of stylized celestial flora and fauna, featuring bioluminescent lotuses and interwoven stardust patterns. The design must possess the aesthetic of a vintage scientific taxonomy illustration mixed with Art Nouveau psychedelia. Use deep jewel tones—sapphire blue, emerald teal, and accents of antique gold and muted lavender—on a crisp, isolated background. Focus on creating strong, defined silhouettes and clean line art. The elements must flow organically, forming a central, highly detailed crest suitable for a chest print. High contrast and clean vector quality are essential.
